segments.text: Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, You who lead Joseph like a flock; You who dwell between the cherubim, shine forth!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Before Ephraim, Benjamin, and Manasseh, Stir up Your strength, And come and save us!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Restore us, O God; Cause Your face to shine, And we shall be saved!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord God of hosts, How long will You be angry Against the prayer of Your people?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have fed them with the bread of tears, And given them tears to drink in great measure.
You have made us a strife to our neighbors, And our enemies laugh among themselves.
Restore us, O God of hosts; Cause Your face to shine, And we shall be saved!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have brought a vine out of Egypt; You have cast out the nations, and planted it.
You prepared room for it, And caused it to take deep root, And it filled the land.
The hills were covered with its shadow, And the mighty cedars with its boughs.
She sent out her boughs to the Sea, And her branches to the River.
Why have You broken down her hedges, So that all who pass by the way pluck her fruit?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The boar out of the woods uproots it, And the wild beast of the field devours it.
Return, we beseech You, O God of hosts; Look down from heaven and see, And visit this vine
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And the vineyard which Your right hand has planted, And the branch that You made strong for Yourself.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; They perish at the rebuke of Your countenance.
Let Your hand be upon the man of Your right hand, Upon the son of man whom You made strong for Yourself.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Then we will not turn back from You; Revive us, and we will call upon Your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Restore us, O Lord God of hosts; Cause Your face to shine, And we shall be saved!
segments.speaker: David
